tasks.name: Create activity icon mapping utility
tasks.purpose: Define a mapping function that returns the appropriate Lucide icon component for each activity_type enum value (lesson_completed, quiz_completed, course_completed, storyboard_submitted, survey_completed)

dependencies: lucide-react icons: BookOpen, CheckCircle2, Award, FileText, ClipboardCheck
constraints: Export single function getActivityIcon(activityType: string)
Return icon component, not JSX
Handle unknown activity types gracefully with fallback icon

tasks.input_state: No icon mapping exists for activity types. Activity type enum is defined in F2 database view.
tasks.output_state: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/activity-icons.ts with getActivityIcon() function that returns Lucide icon components for all 5 activity types.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, exports getActivityIcon(), maps all 5 activity types to correct icons (lesson_completed→BookOpen, quiz_completed→CheckCircle2, course_completed→Award, storyboard_submitted→FileText, survey_completed→ClipboardCheck), and includes fallback

tasks.name: Create activity description formatter utility
tasks.purpose: Create a function that generates user-friendly activity descriptions from activity metadata (e.g., 'Completed lesson • 85%', 'Quiz passed • Score: 92%', 'Course completed')

dependencies: Activity metadata structure from F2 (JSONB field with type-specific data)
constraints: Export single function formatActivityDescription(activityType: string, metadata: unknown)
Handle all 5 activity types with type-specific templates
Use TypeScript type guards for metadata validation
Return string with • separator for multi-part descriptions

tasks.input_state: No formatter exists. Activity metadata structure is defined in F2 view (jsonb_build_object with type-specific fields).
tasks.output_state: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/activity-descriptions.ts with formatActivityDescription() function that generates descriptions for all activity types.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, handles all 5 activity types, uses metadata correctly (e.g., completion_percentage for lessons, score for quizzes, passed boolean for quizzes), returns formatted strings with • separator

tasks.name: Create activity feed list client component
tasks.purpose: Build the client-side timeline renderer that displays activity items with icons, descriptions, and relative timestamps using date-fns

constraints: Must be client component ('use client' directive)
Accept activities prop as array
Render timeline with icon, description, and relative timestamp for each item
Use formatDistanceToNow for timestamps with 'ago' suffix
Limit to 10-15 items as specified
Handle empty array gracefully

tasks.input_state: Icon mapper and description formatter exist from T1 and T2. No activity list component exists.
tasks.output_state: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/activity-feed-list.tsx as client component that renders timeline of activities with icons, descriptions, and relative timestamps.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component exists with 'use client', accepts activities prop, renders each activity with icon from getActivityIcon(), description from formatActivityDescription(), and relative timestamp using formatDistanceToNow(), handles empty state

tasks.name: Create activity feed empty state component
tasks.purpose: Create a reusable empty state component for users with no activity history, providing clear messaging and guidance

constraints: Use EmptyState component from @kit/ui
Include heading 'No Recent Activity'
Include descriptive text explaining how activities appear
Match existing empty state patterns in codebase

tasks.input_state: EmptyState UI components exist from @kit/ui. No activity-specific empty state exists.
tasks.output_state: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/activity-feed-empty.tsx with EmptyState component for no activities.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component exists, uses EmptyState from @kit/ui, includes EmptyStateHeading and EmptyStateText with appropriate messaging about starting activities

tasks.name: Create activity feed widget server component
tasks.purpose: Build the server component that fetches activity data using loadUserActivities() from F2 and renders the Card container with activity feed list or empty state

constraints: Must be async server component (no 'use client')
Call loadUserActivities() with limit of 10-15
Wrap in Card with CardHeader 'Recent Activity'
Render ActivityFeedList if activities exist, else ActivityFeedEmpty
Handle errors with try/catch

tasks.input_state: loadUserActivities() exists from F2. ActivityFeedList and ActivityFeedEmpty exist from T3 and T4. No widget container exists.
tasks.output_state: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/activity-feed-widget.tsx as async server component that fetches activities and renders Card with list or empty state.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component exists as async function without 'use client', calls loadUserActivities(), uses Card from @kit/ui, renders ActivityFeedList when data exists or ActivityFeedEmpty when empty, includes error handling

tasks.name: Create activity feed loading skeleton component
tasks.purpose: Build a loading skeleton that matches the activity feed layout structure for displaying while data loads

constraints: Match activity feed list layout (timeline items)
Show 3-5 skeleton rows
Use Card container matching T5 layout
Use shimmer/pulse animation if available

tasks.input_state: Activity feed widget structure exists from T5. No loading skeleton exists.
tasks.output_state: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/activity-feed-skeleton.tsx with skeleton component matching activity feed layout.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component exists, renders Card with skeleton items matching activity feed layout (icon placeholder, text lines for description and timestamp), shows 3-5 items
